title: rubus argenteus
intro: Rubus argenteus, also known as the silver-bracted dewberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It is primarily found in North America, and its medicinal properties include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and reducing pain. The health benefits of Rubus argenteus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and act as an antioxidant, which helps to protect the body from free radicals. Rubus argenteus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
